message.content:
### 1. Card Labels/Tags Readability  
All card labels (titles) and tags are **highly readable**:  
- **Custom Boxes**: Title is bold and clear; the "Most Requested" tag is a distinct orange badge with white text, standing out against the dark title. Tags (e.g., "Shoe Box," "Pizza Box") use a light green background with dark text, ensuring contrast.  
- **Paper Bags**: Title is bold and legible; tags (e.g., "Shopping Bags," "Kraft Paper Bags") follow the same light green/dark text style as the first card, maintaining consistency.  
- **Calendars**: Title is bold and easy to read; tags (e.g., "Wall Calendars," "Desk Calendars") use the same tag design as the other cards, ensuring uniformity.  


### 2. Image Loading  
All images load **properly**:  
- **Custom Boxes**: Displays white boxes (no broken images or placeholders).  
- **Paper Bags**: Shows brown paper bags (no loading errors).  
- **Calendars**: Displays office supplies (calendars, notebooks) (no issues).  
- **Bottom Row (Cards 04–06)**: All images (e.g., stationery, printed materials, labels) are fully rendered with no broken links or placeholders.  


### 3. Alignment and Spacing  
Alignment and spacing are **well-executed**:  
- **Card Layout**: Cards are evenly spaced in a grid (3 columns, 2 rows) with consistent margins between them. No overlapping or uneven gaps.  
- **Internal Spacing**: Within each card, the image, title, description, and tags are aligned vertically with balanced padding (e.g., title sits above the description, tags are below the description with even spacing).  
- **Bottom Row Numbering**: Circular "04," "05," "06" badges are aligned to the top-right of each card, maintaining consistent positioning.  


### 4. Text Cut-Off or Unreadability  
No text is cut off or unreadable:  
- **Descriptions**: All service descriptions (e.g., "Premium custom-printed boxes for every need...") are fully visible and legible, with no truncation.  
- **Tags**: All tags (e.g., "Food Box," "Luxury Bags") are fully displayed, with no text overflowing or being cropped.  
- **Titles**: Card titles (e.g., "Custom Boxes," "Calendars") are fully visible and easy to read.  


### Summary  
The section is visually consistent, with no technical or design flaws. All elements (labels, images, text) are clear, well-aligned, and properly loaded.
